summary: My final update() implementation: keeps signature update(self, iterable=(), **kwds), assigns via self[key]=self._merged_value(key, val) so __setitem__ still fires for decoding sync; added _merged_value and static _deep_merge helpers below update(), before __reduce__. All assignments go through self[key]= (never bypass __setitem__), so your decorator on __setitem__ will still fire correctly for every merged key. I'm done editing this file - go ahead and wrap/merge.
